commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables the accessibility domain.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables the accessibility domain which causes `AXNodeId`s to remain consistent between method calls.
This turns on accessibility for the page, which can impact performance until accessibility is disabled.

commands.name: getAXNodeAndAncestors
commands.description:
Fetches a node and all ancestors up to and including the root.
Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node to get.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node to get.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node wrapper to get.

commands.name: getChildAXNodes
commands.description:
Fetches a particular accessibility node by AXNodeId.
Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description:
The frame in whose document the node resides.
If omitted, the root frame is used.

commands.name: getFullAXTree
commands.description: Fetches the entire accessibility tree for the root Document

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description:
The maximum depth at which descendants of the root node should be retrieved.
If omitted, the full tree is returned.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description:
The frame for whose document the AX tree should be retrieved.
If omitted, the root frame is used.

commands.name: getPartialAXTree
commands.description: Fetches the accessibility node and partial accessibility tree for this DOM node, if it exists.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node to get the partial accessibility tree for.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node to get the partial accessibility tree for.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node wrapper to get the partial accessibility tree for.

parameters.name: fetchRelatives
parameters.description: Whether to fetch this node's ancestors, siblings and children. Defaults to true.

returns.name: nodes
returns.description:
The `Accessibility.AXNode` for this DOM node, if it exists, plus its ancestors, siblings and
children, if requested.

commands.name: getRootAXNode
commands.description:
Fetches the root node.
Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description:
The frame in whose document the node resides.
If omitted, the root frame is used.

commands.name: queryAXTree
commands.description:
Query a DOM node's accessibility subtree for accessible name and role.
This command computes the name and role for all nodes in the subtree, including those that are
ignored for accessibility, and returns those that match the specified name and role. If no DOM
node is specified, or the DOM node does not exist, the command returns an error. If neither
`accessibleName` or `role` is specified, it returns all the accessibility nodes in the subtree.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node for the root to query.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node for the root to query.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node wrapper for the root to query.

parameters.name: accessibleName
parameters.description: Find nodes with this computed name.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Find nodes with this computed role.

returns.name: nodes
returns.description:
A list of `Accessibility.AXNode` matching the specified attributes,
including nodes that are ignored for accessibility.

events.name: loadComplete
events.description:
The loadComplete event mirrors the load complete event sent by the browser to assistive
technology when the web page has finished loading.

parameters.name: root
parameters.description: New document root node.

events.name: nodesUpdated
events.description: The nodesUpdated event is sent every time a previously requested node has changed the in tree.

parameters.name: nodes
parameters.description: Updated node data.

types.name: Accessibility.AXNode
types.description: A node in the accessibility tree.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this node.

properties.name: ignored
properties.description: Whether this node is ignored for accessibility

properties.name: ignoredReasons
properties.description: Collection of reasons why this node is hidden.

properties.name: role
properties.description: This `Node`'s role, whether explicit or implicit.

properties.name: chromeRole
properties.description: This `Node`'s Chrome raw role.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The accessible name for this `Node`.

properties.name: description
properties.description: The accessible description for this `Node`.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value for this `Node`.

properties.name: properties
properties.description: All other properties

properties.name: parentId
properties.description: ID for this node's parent.

properties.name: childIds
properties.description: IDs for each of this node's child nodes.

properties.name: backendDOMNodeId
properties.description: The backend ID for the associated DOM node, if any.

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: The frame ID for the frame associated with this nodes document.

types.name: Accessibility.AXNodeId
types.description: Unique accessibility node identifier.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of this property.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of this property.

types.name: Accessibility.AXPropertyName
types.description:
Values of AXProperty name:
- from 'busy' to 'roledescription': states which apply to every AX node
- from 'live' to 'root': attributes which apply to nodes in live regions
- from 'autocomplete' to 'valuetext': attributes which apply to widgets
- from 'checked' to 'selected': states which apply to widgets
- from 'activedescendant' to 'owns': relationships between elements other than parent/child/sibling
- from 'activeFullscreenElement' to 'uninteresting': reasons why this noode is hidden

properties.name: backendDOMNodeId
properties.description: The BackendNodeId of the related DOM node.

properties.name: idref
properties.description: The IDRef value provided, if any.

properties.name: text
properties.description: The text alternative of this node in the current context.

types.name: Accessibility.AXValue
types.description: A single computed AX property.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of this value.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The computed value of this property.

properties.name: relatedNodes
properties.description: One or more related nodes, if applicable.

properties.name: sources
properties.description: The sources which contributed to the computation of this property.

types.name: Accessibility.AXValueNativeSourceType
types.description: Enum of possible native property sources (as a subtype of a particular AXValueSourceType).

types.name: Accessibility.AXValueSource
types.description: A single source for a computed AX property.

properties.name: type
properties.description: What type of source this is.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of this property source.

properties.name: attribute
properties.description: The name of the relevant attribute, if any.

properties.name: attributeValue
properties.description: The value of the relevant attribute, if any.

properties.name: superseded
properties.description: Whether this source is superseded by a higher priority source.

properties.name: nativeSource
properties.description: The native markup source for this value, e.g. a `<label>` element.

properties.name: nativeSourceValue
properties.description: The value, such as a node or node list, of the native source.

properties.name: invalid
properties.description: Whether the value for this property is invalid.

properties.name: invalidReason
properties.description: Reason for the value being invalid, if it is.

types.name: Accessibility.AXValueSourceType
types.description: Enum of possible property sources.

types.name: Accessibility.AXValueType
types.description: Enum of possible property types.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables animation domain notifications.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables animation domain notifications.

commands.name: getCurrentTime
commands.description: Returns the current time of the an animation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of animation.

returns.name: currentTime
returns.description: Current time of the page.

commands.name: getPlaybackRate
commands.description: Gets the playback rate of the document timeline.

returns.name: playbackRate
returns.description: Playback rate for animations on page.

commands.name: releaseAnimations
commands.description: Releases a set of animations to no longer be manipulated.

parameters.name: animations
parameters.description: List of animation ids to seek.

commands.name: resolveAnimation
commands.description: Gets the remote object of the Animation.

parameters.name: animationId

returns.name: remoteObject

commands.name: seekAnimations
commands.description: Seek a set of animations to a particular time within each animation.

parameters.name: animations
parameters.description: List of animation ids to seek.

parameters.name: currentTime
parameters.description: Set the current time of each animation.

commands.name: setPaused
commands.description: Sets the paused state of a set of animations.

parameters.name: animations
parameters.description: Animations to set the pause state of.

parameters.name: paused
parameters.description: Paused state to set to.

commands.name: setPlaybackRate
commands.description: Sets the playback rate of the document timeline.

parameters.name: playbackRate
parameters.description: Playback rate for animations on page

commands.name: setTiming
commands.description: Sets the timing of an animation node.

parameters.name: animationId
parameters.description: Animation id.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration of the animation.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Delay of the animation.

events.name: animationCanceled
events.description: Event for when an animation has been cancelled.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the animation that was cancelled.

events.name: animationCreated
events.description: Event for each animation that has been created.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the animation that was created.

events.name: animationStarted
events.description: Event for animation that has been started.

parameters.name: animation
parameters.description: Animation that was started.

events.name: animationUpdated
events.description: Event for animation that has been updated.

parameters.name: animation
parameters.description: Animation that was updated.

properties.name: cssId

A unique ID for `Animation` representing the sources that triggered this CSS
animation/transition.

Represents the starting scroll position of the timeline

domains.name: Audits
domains.description: Audits domain allows investigation of page violations and possible improvements.

commands.name: checkFormsIssues
commands.description:
Runs the form issues check for the target page. Found issues are reported
using Audits.issueAdded event.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables issues domain, prevents further issues from being reported to the client.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables issues domain, sends the issues collected so far to the client by means of the
`issueAdded` event.

commands.name: getEncodedResponse
commands.description:
Returns the response body and size if it were re-encoded with the specified settings. Only
applies to images.

parameters.name: requestId
parameters.description: Identifier of the network request to get content for.

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: The encoding to use.

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: The quality of the encoding (0-1). (defaults to 1)

parameters.name: sizeOnly
parameters.description: Whether to only return the size information (defaults to false).

returns.name: body
returns.description: The encoded body as a base64 string. Omitted if sizeOnly is true. (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

returns.name: originalSize
returns.description: Size before re-encoding.

returns.name: encodedSize
returns.description: Size after re-encoding.

types.name: Audits.AffectedCookie
types.description: Information about a cookie that is affected by an inspector issue.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The following three properties uniquely identify a cookie

types.name: Audits.AffectedFrame
types.description: Information about the frame affected by an inspector issue.

types.name: Audits.AffectedRequest
types.description: Information about a request that is affected by an inspector issue.

properties.name: requestId
properties.description: The unique request id.

types.name: Audits.AttributionReportingIssueDetails
types.description:
Details for issues around "Attribution Reporting API" usage.
Explainer: https://github.com/WICG/attribution-reporting-api

types.name: Audits.BlockedByResponseIssueDetails
types.description:
Details for a request that has been blocked with the BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE
code. Currently only used for COEP/COOP, but may be extended to include
some CSP errors in the future.

types.name: Audits.BlockedByResponseReason
types.description:
Enum indicating the reason a response has been blocked. These reasons are
refinements of the net error BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.

types.name: Audits.BounceTrackingIssueDetails
types.description:
This issue warns about sites in the redirect chain of a finished navigation
that may be flagged as trackers and have their state cleared if they don't
receive a user interaction. Note that in this context 'site' means eTLD+1.
For example, if the URL `https://example.test:80/bounce` was in the
redirect chain, the site reported would be `example.test`.

types.name: Audits.ClientHintIssueDetails
types.description:
This issue tracks client hints related issues. It's used to deprecate old
features, encourage the use of new ones, and provide general guidance.

properties.name: blockedURL
properties.description: The url not included in allowed sources.

properties.name: violatedDirective
properties.description: Specific directive that is violated, causing the CSP issue.

types.name: Audits.CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails
types.description:
This issue warns about third-party sites that are accessing cookies on the
current page, and have been permitted due to having a global metadata grant.
Note that in this context 'site' means eTLD+1. For example, if the URL
`https://example.test:80/web_page` was accessing cookies, the site reported
would be `example.test`.

types.name: Audits.CookieIssueDetails
types.description:
This information is currently necessary, as the front-end has a difficult
time finding a specific cookie. With this, we can convey specific error
information without the cookie.

properties.name: cookie
properties.description:
If AffectedCookie is not set then rawCookieLine contains the raw
Set-Cookie header string. This hints at a problem where the
cookie line is syntactically or semantically malformed in a way
that no valid cookie could be created.

properties.name: operation
properties.description:
Optionally identifies the site-for-cookies and the cookie url, which
may be used by the front-end as additional context.

properties.name: insight
properties.description: The recommended solution to the issue.

types.name: Audits.CookieIssueInsight
types.description: Information about the suggested solution to a cookie issue.

properties.name: tableEntryUrl
properties.description: Link to table entry in third-party cookie migration readiness list.

types.name: Audits.CorsIssueDetails
types.description:
Details for a CORS related issue, e.g. a warning or error related to
CORS RFC1918 enforcement.

types.name: Audits.DeprecationIssueDetails
types.description:
This issue tracks information needed to print a deprecation message.
https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/deprecation/README.md

properties.name: type
properties.description: One of the deprecation names from third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/deprecation/deprecation.json5

types.name: Audits.ElementAccessibilityIssueDetails
types.description: This issue warns about errors in the select or summary element content model.

properties.name: url
properties.description: The URL that failed to load.

properties.name: failureMessage
properties.description: The failure message for the failed request.

types.name: Audits.FederatedAuthRequestIssueReason
types.description:
Represents the failure reason when a federated authentication reason fails.
Should be updated alongside RequestIdTokenStatus in
third_party/blink/public/mojom/devtools/inspector_issue.mojom to include
all cases except for success.

types.name: Audits.FederatedAuthUserInfoRequestIssueReason
types.description:
Represents the failure reason when a getUserInfo() call fails.
Should be updated alongside FederatedAuthUserInfoRequestResult in
third_party/blink/public/mojom/devtools/inspector_issue.mojom.

types.name: Audits.GenericIssueDetails
types.description: Depending on the concrete errorType, different properties are set.

properties.name: errorType
properties.description: Issues with the same errorType are aggregated in the frontend.

properties.name: resolution
properties.description: The resolution status, either blocking the content or warning.

properties.name: reason
properties.description: The reason the ad was blocked, total network or cpu or peak cpu.

properties.name: frame
properties.description: The frame that was blocked.

types.name: Audits.InsightType
types.description: Represents the category of insight that a cookie issue falls under.

types.name: Audits.InspectorIssue
types.description: An inspector issue reported from the back-end.

properties.name: issueId
properties.description:
A unique id for this issue. May be omitted if no other entity (e.g.
exception, CDP message, etc.) is referencing this issue.

types.name: Audits.InspectorIssueCode
types.description:
A unique identifier for the type of issue. Each type may use one of the
optional fields in InspectorIssueDetails to convey more specific
information about the kind of issue.

types.name: Audits.InspectorIssueDetails
types.description:
This struct holds a list of optional fields with additional information
specific to the kind of issue. When adding a new issue code, please also
add a new optional field to this type.

types.name: Audits.IssueId
types.description:
A unique id for a DevTools inspector issue. Allows other entities (e.g.
exceptions, CDP message, console messages, etc.) to reference an issue.

properties.name: resourceType
properties.description:
The type of resource causing the mixed content issue (css, js, iframe,
form,...). Marked as optional because it is mapped to from
blink::mojom::RequestContextType, which will be replaced
by network::mojom::RequestDestination

properties.name: resolutionStatus
properties.description: The way the mixed content issue is being resolved.

properties.name: insecureURL
properties.description: The unsafe http url causing the mixed content issue.

properties.name: mainResourceURL
properties.description: The url responsible for the call to an unsafe url.

properties.name: request
properties.description:
The mixed content request.
Does not always exist (e.g. for unsafe form submission urls).

properties.name: frame
properties.description: Optional because not every mixed content issue is necessarily linked to a frame.

properties.name: url
properties.description: The BlobURL that failed to load.

properties.name: partitioningBlobURLInfo
properties.description: Additional information about the Partitioning Blob URL issue.

types.name: Audits.PerformanceIssueDetails
types.description: Details for a performance issue.

types.name: Audits.PermissionElementIssueDetails
types.description: This issue warns about improper usage of the <permission> element.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The value of the type attribute.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: The node ID of the <permission> element.

properties.name: isWarning
properties.description: True if the issue is a warning, false if it is an error.

properties.name: permissionName
properties.description:
Fields for message construction:
Used for messages that reference a specific permission name

properties.name: occluderNodeInfo
properties.description: Used for messages about occlusion

properties.name: occluderParentNodeInfo
properties.description: Used for messages about occluder's parent

properties.name: disableReason
properties.description: Used for messages about activation disabled reason

types.name: Audits.PropertyRuleIssueDetails
types.description:
This issue warns about errors in property rules that lead to property
registrations being ignored.

properties.name: sourceCodeLocation
properties.description: Source code position of the property rule.

properties.name: propertyRuleIssueReason
properties.description: Reason why the property rule was discarded.

properties.name: propertyValue
properties.description: The value of the property rule property that failed to parse

types.name: Audits.QuirksModeIssueDetails
types.description:
Details for issues about documents in Quirks Mode
or Limited Quirks Mode that affects page layouting.

properties.name: isLimitedQuirksMode
properties.description:
If false, it means the document's mode is "quirks"
instead of "limited-quirks".

types.name: Audits.SelectivePermissionsInterventionIssueDetails
types.description:
The issue warns about blocked calls to privacy sensitive APIs via the
Selective Permissions Intervention.

properties.name: apiName
properties.description: Which API was intervened on.

properties.name: adAncestry
properties.description: Why the ad script using the API is considered an ad.

properties.name: stackTrace
properties.description: The stack trace at the time of the intervention.

types.name: Audits.SharedArrayBufferIssueDetails
types.description:
Details for a issue arising from an SAB being instantiated in, or
transferred to a context that is not cross-origin isolated.

types.name: Audits.StylesheetLoadingIssueDetails
types.description: This issue warns when a referenced stylesheet couldn't be loaded.

properties.name: sourceCodeLocation
properties.description: Source code position that referenced the failing stylesheet.

properties.name: styleSheetLoadingIssueReason
properties.description: Reason why the stylesheet couldn't be loaded.

properties.name: failedRequestInfo
properties.description: Contains additional info when the failure was due to a request.

types.name: Audits.UserReidentificationIssueDetails
types.description:
This issue warns about uses of APIs that may be considered misuse to
re-identify users.

properties.name: request
properties.description: Applies to BlockedFrameNavigation and BlockedSubresource issue types.

properties.name: sourceCodeLocation
properties.description: Applies to NoisedCanvasReadback issue type.

domains.name: Autofill
domains.description: Defines commands and events for Autofill.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables autofill domain notifications.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables autofill domain notifications.

commands.name: setAddresses
commands.description: Set addresses so that developers can verify their forms implementation.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description:
Trigger autofill on a form identified by the fieldId.
If the field and related form cannot be autofilled, returns an error.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: Identifies a field that serves as an anchor for autofill.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: Identifies the frame that field belongs to.

parameters.name: card
parameters.description: Credit card information to fill out the form. Credit card data is not saved.  Mutually exclusive with `address`.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address to fill out the form. Address data is not saved. Mutually exclusive with `card`.

events.name: addressFormFilled
events.description: Emitted when an address form is filled.

parameters.name: filledFields
parameters.description: Information about the fields that were filled

parameters.name: addressUi
parameters.description:
An UI representation of the address used to fill the form.
Consists of a 2D array where each child represents an address/profile line.

properties.name: fields
properties.description: fields and values defining an address.

properties.name: name
properties.description:
address field name, for example GIVEN_NAME.
The full list of supported field names:
https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:components/autofill/core/browser/field_types.cc;l=38

properties.name: value
properties.description: address field value, for example Jon Doe.

types.name: Autofill.AddressFields
types.description: A list of address fields.

types.name: Autofill.AddressUI
types.description:
Defines how an address can be displayed like in chrome://settings/addresses.
Address UI is a two dimensional array, each inner array is an "address information line", and when rendered in a UI surface should be displayed as such.
The following address UI for instance:
[[{name: "GIVE_NAME", value: "Jon"}, {name: "FAMILY_NAME", value: "Doe"}], [{name: "CITY", value: "Munich"}, {name: "ZIP", value: "81456"}]]
should allow the receiver to render:
Jon Doe
Munich 81456

properties.name: addressFields
properties.description: A two dimension array containing the representation of values from an address profile.

properties.name: number
properties.description: 16-digit credit card number.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the credit card owner.

properties.name: expiryMonth
properties.description: 2-digit expiry month.

properties.name: expiryYear
properties.description: 4-digit expiry year.

properties.name: cvc
properties.description: 3-digit card verification code.

properties.name: htmlType
properties.description: The type of the field, e.g text, password etc.

properties.name: id
properties.description: the html id

properties.name: name
properties.description: the html name

properties.name: value
properties.description: the field value

properties.name: autofillType
properties.description: The actual field type, e.g FAMILY_NAME

properties.name: fillingStrategy
properties.description: The filling strategy

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: The frame the field belongs to

properties.name: fieldId
properties.description: The form field's DOM node

types.name: Autofill.FillingStrategy
types.description: Specified whether a filled field was done so by using the html autocomplete attribute or autofill heuristics.

domains.name: BackgroundService
domains.description: Defines events for background web platform features.

commands.name: clearEvents
commands.description: Clears all stored data for the service.

commands.name: setRecording
commands.description: Set the recording state for the service.

commands.name: startObserving
commands.description: Enables event updates for the service.

commands.name: stopObserving
commands.description: Disables event updates for the service.

events.name: backgroundServiceEventReceived
events.description:
Called with all existing backgroundServiceEvents when enabled, and all new
events afterwards if enabled and recording.

events.name: recordingStateChanged
events.description: Called when the recording state for the service has been updated.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Timestamp of the event (in seconds).

properties.name: origin
properties.description: The origin this event belongs to.

properties.name: serviceWorkerRegistrationId
properties.description: The Service Worker ID that initiated the event.

properties.name: service
properties.description: The Background Service this event belongs to.

properties.name: eventName
properties.description: A description of the event.

properties.name: instanceId
properties.description: An identifier that groups related events together.

properties.name: eventMetadata
properties.description: A list of event-specific information.

properties.name: storageKey
properties.description: Storage key this event belongs to.

types.name: BackgroundService.EventMetadata
types.description: A key-value pair for additional event information to pass along.

types.name: BackgroundService.ServiceName
types.description:
The Background Service that will be associated with the commands/events.
Every Background Service operates independently, but they share the same
API.

domains.name: BluetoothEmulation
domains.description:
This domain allows configuring virtual Bluetooth devices to test
the web-bluetooth API.

commands.name: addCharacteristic
commands.description:
Adds a characteristic with |characteristicUuid| and |properties| to the
service represented by |serviceId|.

returns.name: characteristicId
returns.description: An identifier that uniquely represents this characteristic.

commands.name: addDescriptor
commands.description:
Adds a descriptor with |descriptorUuid| to the characteristic respresented
by |characteristicId|.

returns.name: descriptorId
returns.description: An identifier that uniquely represents this descriptor.

commands.name: addService
commands.description: Adds a service with |serviceUuid| to the peripheral with |address|.

returns.name: serviceId
returns.description: An identifier that uniquely represents this service.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disable the BluetoothEmulation domain.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enable the BluetoothEmulation domain.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State of the simulated central.

parameters.name: leSupported
parameters.description: If the simulated central supports low-energy.

commands.name: removeCharacteristic
commands.description:
Removes the characteristic respresented by |characteristicId| from the
simulated central.

commands.name: removeDescriptor
commands.description: Removes the descriptor with |descriptorId| from the simulated central.

commands.name: removeService
commands.description: Removes the service respresented by |serviceId| from the simulated central.

commands.name: setSimulatedCentralState
commands.description: Set the state of the simulated central.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State of the simulated central.

commands.name: simulateAdvertisement
commands.description:
Simulates an advertisement packet described in |entry| being received by
the central.

commands.name: simulateCharacteristicOperationResponse
commands.description:
Simulates the response from the characteristic with |characteristicId| for a
characteristic operation of |type|. The |code| value follows the Error
Codes from Bluetooth Core Specification Vol 3 Part F 3.4.1.1 Error Response.
The |data| is expected to exist when simulating a successful read operation
response.

commands.name: simulateDescriptorOperationResponse
commands.description:
Simulates the response from the descriptor with |descriptorId| for a
descriptor operation of |type|. The |code| value follows the Error
Codes from Bluetooth Core Specification Vol 3 Part F 3.4.1.1 Error Response.
The |data| is expected to exist when simulating a successful read operation
response.

commands.name: simulateGATTDisconnection
commands.description: Simulates a GATT disconnection from the peripheral with |address|.

commands.name: simulateGATTOperationResponse
commands.description:
Simulates the response code from the peripheral with |address| for a
GATT operation of |type|. The |code| value follows the HCI Error Codes from
Bluetooth Core Specification Vol 2 Part D 1.3 List Of Error Codes.

commands.name: simulatePreconnectedPeripheral
commands.description:
Simulates a peripheral with |address|, |name| and |knownServiceUuids|
that has already been connected to the system.

events.name: characteristicOperationReceived
events.description:
Event for when a characteristic operation of |type| to the characteristic
respresented by |characteristicId| happened. |data| and |writeType| is
expected to exist when |type| is write.

events.name: descriptorOperationReceived
events.description:
Event for when a descriptor operation of |type| to the descriptor
respresented by |descriptorId| happened. |data| is expected to exist when
|type| is write.

events.name: gattOperationReceived
events.description:
Event for when a GATT operation of |type| to the peripheral with |address|
happened.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.CentralState
types.description: Indicates the various states of Central.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.CharacteristicOperationType
types.description: Indicates the various types of characteristic operation.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.CharacteristicProperties
types.description:
Describes the properties of a characteristic. This follows Bluetooth Core
Specification BT 4.2 Vol 3 Part G 3.3.1. Characteristic Properties.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.CharacteristicWriteType
types.description: Indicates the various types of characteristic write.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.DescriptorOperationType
types.description: Indicates the various types of descriptor operation.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.GATTOperationType
types.description: Indicates the various types of GATT event.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.ManufacturerData
types.description: Stores the manufacturer data

properties.name: key
properties.description:
Company identifier
https://bitbucket.org/bluetooth-SIG/public/src/main/assigned_numbers/company_identifiers/company_identifiers.yaml
https://usb.org/developers

properties.name: data
properties.description: Manufacturer-specific data (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.ScanEntry
types.description: Stores the advertisement packet information that is sent by a Bluetooth device.

types.name: BluetoothEmulation.ScanRecord
types.description: Stores the byte data of the advertisement packet sent by a Bluetooth device.

properties.name: appearance
properties.description: Stores the external appearance description of the device.

properties.name: txPower
properties.description: Stores the transmission power of a broadcasting device.

properties.name: manufacturerData
properties.description:
Key is the company identifier and the value is an array of bytes of
manufacturer specific data.

domains.name: Browser
domains.description: The Browser domain defines methods and events for browser managing.

commands.name: addPrivacySandboxCoordinatorKeyConfig
commands.description:
Configures encryption keys used with a given privacy sandbox API to talk
to a trusted coordinator.  Since this is intended for test automation only,
coordinatorOrigin must be a .test domain. No existing coordinator
configuration for the origin may exist.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description:
BrowserContext to perform the action in. When omitted, default browser
context is used.

commands.name: addPrivacySandboxEnrollmentOverride
commands.description:
Allows a site to use privacy sandbox features that require enrollment
without the site actually being enrolled. Only supported on page targets.

commands.name: cancelDownload
commands.description: Cancel a download if in progress

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: Global unique identifier of the download.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: BrowserContext to perform the action in. When omitted, default browser context is used.

commands.name: close
commands.description: Close browser gracefully.

commands.name: crash
commands.description: Crashes browser on the main thread.

commands.name: crashGpuProcess
commands.description: Crashes GPU process.

commands.name: executeBrowserCommand
commands.description: Invoke custom browser commands used by telemetry.

commands.name: getBrowserCommandLine
commands.description:
Returns the command line switches for the browser process if, and only if
--enable-automation is on the commandline.

returns.name: arguments
returns.description: Commandline parameters

commands.name: getHistogram
commands.description: Get a Chrome histogram by name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Requested histogram name.

parameters.name: delta
parameters.description: If true, retrieve delta since last delta call.

returns.name: histogram
returns.description: Histogram.

commands.name: getHistograms
commands.description: Get Chrome histograms.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description:
Requested substring in name. Only histograms which have query as a
substring in their name are extracted. An empty or absent query returns
all histograms.

parameters.name: delta
parameters.description: If true, retrieve delta since last delta call.

returns.name: histograms
returns.description: Histograms.

commands.name: getVersion
commands.description: Returns version information.

returns.name: protocolVersion
returns.description: Protocol version.

returns.name: product
returns.description: Product name.

returns.name: revision
returns.description: Product revision.

returns.name: userAgent
returns.description: User-Agent.

returns.name: jsVersion
returns.description: V8 version.

commands.name: getWindowBounds
commands.description: Get position and size of the browser window.

parameters.name: windowId
parameters.description: Browser window id.

returns.name: bounds
returns.description:
Bounds information of the window. When window state is 'minimized', the restored window
position and size are returned.

commands.name: getWindowForTarget
commands.description: Get the browser window that contains the devtools target.

parameters.name: targetId
parameters.description: Devtools agent host id. If called as a part of the session, associated targetId is used.

returns.name: windowId
returns.description: Browser window id.

returns.name: bounds
returns.description:
Bounds information of the window. When window state is 'minimized', the restored window
position and size are returned.

commands.name: grantPermissions
commands.description:
Grant specific permissions to the given origin and reject all others. Deprecated. Use
setPermission instead.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Origin the permission applies to, all origins if not specified.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: BrowserContext to override permissions. When omitted, default browser context is used.

commands.name: resetPermissions
commands.description: Reset all permission management for all origins.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: BrowserContext to reset permissions. When omitted, default browser context is used.

commands.name: setContentsSize
commands.description: Set size of the browser contents resizing browser window as necessary.

parameters.name: windowId
parameters.description: Browser window id.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description:
The window contents width in DIP. Assumes current width if omitted.
Must be specified if 'height' is omitted.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description:
The window contents height in DIP. Assumes current height if omitted.
Must be specified if 'width' is omitted.

commands.name: setDockTile
commands.description: Set dock tile details, platform-specific.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: Png encoded image. (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

commands.name: setDownloadBehavior
commands.description: Set the behavior when downloading a file.

parameters.name: behavior
parameters.description:
Whether to allow all or deny all download requests, or use default Chrome behavior if
available (otherwise deny). |allowAndName| allows download and names files according to
their download guids.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: BrowserContext to set download behavior. When omitted, default browser context is used.

parameters.name: downloadPath
parameters.description:
The default path to save downloaded files to. This is required if behavior is set to 'allow'
or 'allowAndName'.

parameters.name: eventsEnabled
parameters.description: Whether to emit download events (defaults to false).

commands.name: setPermission
commands.description: Set permission settings for given embedding and embedded origins.

parameters.name: permission
parameters.description: Descriptor of permission to override.

parameters.name: setting
parameters.description: Setting of the permission.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Embedding origin the permission applies to, all origins if not specified.

parameters.name: embeddedOrigin
parameters.description:
Embedded origin the permission applies to. It is ignored unless the embedding origin is
present and valid. If the embedding origin is provided but the embedded origin isn't, the
embedding origin is used as the embedded origin.

parameters.name: browserContextId
parameters.description: Context to override. When omitted, default browser context is used.

commands.name: setWindowBounds
commands.description: Set position and/or size of the browser window.

parameters.name: windowId
parameters.description: Browser window id.

parameters.name: bounds
parameters.description:
New window bounds. The 'minimized', 'maximized' and 'fullscreen' states cannot be combined
with 'left', 'top', 'width' or 'height'. Leaves unspecified fields unchanged.

events.name: downloadProgress
events.description: Fired when download makes progress. Last call has |done| == true.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: Global unique identifier of the download.

parameters.name: totalBytes
parameters.description: Total expected bytes to download.

parameters.name: receivedBytes
parameters.description: Total bytes received.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Download status.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description:
If download is "completed", provides the path of the downloaded file.
Depending on the platform, it is not guaranteed to be set, nor the file
is guaranteed to exist.

events.name: downloadWillBegin
events.description: Fired when page is about to start a download.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: Id of the frame that caused the download to begin.

parameters.name: guid
parameters.description: Global unique identifier of the download.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the resource being downloaded.

parameters.name: suggestedFilename
parameters.description: Suggested file name of the resource (the actual name of the file saved on disk may differ).

types.name: Browser.Bounds

properties.name: left

properties.name: top

properties.name: width

properties.name: height

properties.name: windowState
properties.description: The window state. Default to normal.

types.name: Browser.BrowserCommandId
types.description: Browser command ids used by executeBrowserCommand.

types.name: Browser.Bucket

properties.name: count

properties.name: name

properties.name: sum
properties.description: Sum of sample values.

properties.name: count

properties.name: buckets
properties.description: Buckets.

types.name: Browser.PermissionDescriptor
types.description:
Definition of PermissionDescriptor defined in the Permissions API:
https://w3c.github.io/permissions/#dom-permissiondescriptor.

properties.name: name
properties.description:
Name of permission.
See https://cs.chromium.org/chromium/src/third_party/blink/renderer/modules/permissions/permission_descriptor.idl for valid permission names.

properties.name: sysex
properties.description: For "midi" permission, may also specify sysex control.

properties.name: userVisibleOnly

For "push" permission, may specify userVisibleOnly.
Note that userVisibleOnly = true is the only currently supported type.

properties.name: allowWithoutSanitization

properties.name: panTiltZoom
properties.description: For "camera" permission, may specify panTiltZoom.

types.name: Browser.WindowState

domains.name: Cast
domains.description:
A domain for interacting with Cast, Presentation API, and Remote Playback API
functionalities.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Stops observing for sinks and issues.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Starts observing for sinks that can be used for tab mirroring, and if set,
sinks compatible with |presentationUrl| as well. When sinks are found, a
|sinksUpdated| event is fired.
Also starts observing for issue messages. When an issue is added or removed,
an |issueUpdated| event is fired.

commands.name: setSinkToUse
commands.description:
Sets a sink to be used when the web page requests the browser to choose a
sink via Presentation API, Remote Playback API, or Cast SDK.

commands.name: startDesktopMirroring
commands.description: Starts mirroring the desktop to the sink.

commands.name: startTabMirroring
commands.description: Starts mirroring the tab to the sink.

commands.name: stopCasting
commands.description: Stops the active Cast session on the sink.

events.name: issueUpdated
events.description:
This is fired whenever the outstanding issue/error message changes.
|issueMessage| is empty if there is no issue.

events.name: sinksUpdated
events.description:
This is fired whenever the list of available sinks changes. A sink is a
device or a software surface that you can cast to.

properties.name: session
properties.description:
Text describing the current session. Present only if there is an active
session on the sink.

domains.name: Console
domains.description: This domain is deprecated - use Runtime or Log instead.

commands.name: clearMessages
commands.description: Does nothing.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables console domain, prevents further console messages from being reported to the client.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables console domain, sends the messages collected so far to the client by means of the
`messageAdded` notification.

events.name: messageAdded
events.description: Issued when new console message is added.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Console message that has been added.

types.name: Console.ConsoleMessage
types.description: Console message.

properties.name: source
properties.description: Message source.

properties.name: level
properties.description: Message severity.

properties.name: text
properties.description: Message text.

properties.name: url
properties.description: URL of the message origin.

properties.name: line
properties.description: Line number in the resource that generated this message (1-based).

properties.name: column
properties.description: Column number in the resource that generated this message (1-based).

domains.name: CrashReportContext
domains.description: This domain exposes the current state of the CrashReportContext API.

commands.name: getEntries
commands.description: Returns all entries in the CrashReportContext across all frames in the page.

types.name: CrashReportContext.CrashReportContextEntry
types.description: Key-value pair in CrashReportContext.

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: The ID of the frame where the key-value pair was set.

domains.name: CSS
domains.description:
This domain exposes CSS read/write operations. All CSS objects (stylesheets, rules, and styles)
have an associated `id` used in subsequent operations on the related object. Each object type has
a specific `id` structure, and those are not interchangeable between objects of different kinds.
CSS objects can be loaded using the `get*ForNode()` calls (which accept a DOM node id). A client
can also keep track of stylesheets via the `styleSheetAdded`/`styleSheetRemoved` events and
subsequently load the required stylesheet contents using the `getStyleSheet[Text]()` methods.

commands.name: addRule
commands.description:
Inserts a new rule with the given `ruleText` in a stylesheet with given `styleSheetId`, at the
position specified by `location`.

parameters.name: styleSheetId
parameters.description: The css style sheet identifier where a new rule should be inserted.

parameters.name: ruleText
parameters.description: The text of a new rule.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Text position of a new rule in the target style sheet.

parameters.name: nodeForPropertySyntaxValidation
parameters.description:
NodeId for the DOM node in whose context custom property declarations for registered properties should be
validated. If omitted, declarations in the new rule text can only be validated statically, which may produce
incorrect results if the declaration contains a var() for example.

returns.name: rule
returns.description: The newly created rule.

commands.name: collectClassNames
commands.description: Returns all class names from specified stylesheet.

returns.name: classNames
returns.description: Class name list.

commands.name: createStyleSheet
commands.description: Creates a new special "via-inspector" stylesheet in the frame with given `frameId`.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: Identifier of the frame where "via-inspector" stylesheet should be created.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description:
If true, creates a new stylesheet for every call. If false,
returns a stylesheet previously created by a call with force=false
for the frame's document if it exists or creates a new stylesheet
(default: false).

returns.name: styleSheetId
returns.description: Identifier of the created "via-inspector" stylesheet.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables the CSS agent for the given page.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables the CSS agent for the given page. Clients should not assume that the CSS agent has been
enabled until the result of this command is received.

commands.name: forcePseudoState
commands.description:
Ensures that the given node will have specified pseudo-classes whenever its style is computed by
the browser.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: The element id for which to force the pseudo state.

parameters.name: forcedPseudoClasses
parameters.description: Element pseudo classes to force when computing the element's style.

commands.name: forceStartingStyle
commands.description: Ensures that the given node is in its starting-style state.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: The element id for which to force the starting-style state.

parameters.name: forced
parameters.description: Boolean indicating if this is on or off.

commands.name: getAnimatedStylesForNode
commands.description:
Returns the styles coming from animations & transitions
including the animation & transition styles coming from inheritance chain.

returns.name: animationStyles
returns.description: Styles coming from animations.

returns.name: transitionsStyle
returns.description: Style coming from transitions.

returns.name: inherited
returns.description:
Inherited style entries for animationsStyle and transitionsStyle from
the inheritance chain of the element.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node to get background colors for.

returns.name: backgroundColors
returns.description:
The range of background colors behind this element, if it contains any visible text. If no
visible text is present, this will be undefined. In the case of a flat background color,
this will consist of simply that color. In the case of a gradient, this will consist of each
of the color stops. For anything more complicated, this will be an empty array. Images will
be ignored (as if the image had failed to load).

returns.name: computedFontSize
returns.description: The computed font size for this node, as a CSS computed value string (e.g. '12px').

returns.name: computedFontWeight
returns.description:
The computed font weight for this node, as a CSS computed value string (e.g. 'normal' or
'100').

commands.name: getComputedStyleForNode
commands.description: Returns the computed style for a DOM node identified by `nodeId`.

returns.name: computedStyle
returns.description: Computed style for the specified DOM node.

returns.name: extraFields
returns.description:
A list of non-standard "extra fields" which blink stores alongside each
computed style.

commands.name: getEnvironmentVariables
commands.description: Returns the values of the default UA-defined environment variables used in env()

commands.name: getInlineStylesForNode
commands.description:
Returns the styles defined inline (explicitly in the "style" attribute and implicitly, using DOM
attributes) for a DOM node identified by `nodeId`.

returns.name: inlineStyle
returns.description: Inline style for the specified DOM node.

returns.name: attributesStyle
returns.description: Attribute-defined element style (e.g. resulting from "width=20 height=100%").

commands.name: getLayersForNode
commands.description:
Returns all layers parsed by the rendering engine for the tree scope of a node.
Given a DOM element identified by nodeId, getLayersForNode returns the root
layer for the nearest ancestor document or shadow root. The layer root contains
the full layer tree for the tree scope and their ordering.

commands.name: getLocationForSelector
commands.description:
Given a CSS selector text and a style sheet ID, getLocationForSelector
returns an array of locations of the CSS selector in the style sheet.

commands.name: getMatchedStylesForNode
commands.description: Returns requested styles for a DOM node identified by `nodeId`.

returns.name: inlineStyle
returns.description: Inline style for the specified DOM node.

returns.name: attributesStyle
returns.description: Attribute-defined element style (e.g. resulting from "width=20 height=100%").

returns.name: matchedCSSRules
returns.description: CSS rules matching this node, from all applicable stylesheets.

returns.name: pseudoElements
returns.description: Pseudo style matches for this node.

returns.name: inherited
returns.description: A chain of inherited styles (from the immediate node parent up to the DOM tree root).

returns.name: inheritedPseudoElements
returns.description: A chain of inherited pseudo element styles (from the immediate node parent up to the DOM tree root).

returns.name: cssKeyframesRules
returns.description: A list of CSS keyframed animations matching this node.

returns.name: cssPositionTryRules
returns.description: A list of CSS @position-try rules matching this node, based on the position-try-fallbacks property.

returns.name: activePositionFallbackIndex
returns.description:
Index of the active fallback in the applied position-try-fallback property,
will not be set if there is no active position-try fallback.

returns.name: cssPropertyRules
returns.description: A list of CSS at-property rules matching this node.

returns.name: cssPropertyRegistrations
returns.description: A list of CSS property registrations matching this node.

returns.name: cssAtRules
returns.description: A list of simple @rules matching this node or its pseudo-elements.

returns.name: parentLayoutNodeId
returns.description: Id of the first parent element that does not have display: contents.

returns.name: cssFunctionRules
returns.description: A list of CSS at-function rules referenced by styles of this node.

commands.name: getMediaQueries
commands.description: Returns all media queries parsed by the rendering engine.

commands.name: getPlatformFontsForNode
commands.description:
Requests information about platform fonts which we used to render child TextNodes in the given
node.

returns.name: fonts
returns.description: Usage statistics for every employed platform font.

commands.name: getStyleSheetText
commands.description: Returns the current textual content for a stylesheet.

returns.name: text
returns.description: The stylesheet text.

commands.name: resolveValues
commands.description:
Resolve the specified values in the context of the provided element.
For example, a value of '1em' is evaluated according to the computed
'font-size' of the element and a value 'calc(1px + 2px)' will be
resolved to '3px'.
If the `propertyName` was specified the `values` are resolved as if
they were property's declaration. If a value cannot be parsed according
to the provided property syntax, the value is parsed using combined
syntax as if null `propertyName` was provided. If the value cannot be
resolved even then, return the provided value without any changes.
Note: this function currently does not resolve CSS random() function,
it returns unmodified random() function parts.`

commands.name: trackComputedStyleUpdates
commands.description:
Starts tracking the given computed styles for updates. The specified array of properties
replaces the one previously specified. Pass empty array to disable tracking.
Use takeComputedStyleUpdates to retrieve the list of nodes that had properties modified.
The changes to computed style properties are only tracked for nodes pushed to the front-end
by the DOM agent. If no changes to the tracked properties occur after the node has been pushed
to the front-end, no updates will be issued for the node.

commands.name: trackComputedStyleUpdatesForNode
commands.description:
Starts tracking the given node for the computed style updates
and whenever the computed style is updated for node, it queues
a `computedStyleUpdated` event with throttling.
There can only be 1 node tracked for computed style updates
so passing a new node id removes tracking from the previous node.
Pass `undefined` to disable tracking.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: The node id that has updated computed styles.

domains.name: Debugger
domains.description:
Debugger domain exposes JavaScript debugging capabilities. It allows setting and removing
breakpoints, stepping through execution, exploring stack traces, etc.

commands.name: continueToLocation
commands.description: Continues execution until specific location is reached.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Location to continue to.

commands.description: Disables debugger for given page.

parameters.name: scriptId
parameters.description: Id of the script to disassemble

returns.name: streamId
returns.description:
For large modules, return a stream from which additional chunks of
disassembly can be read successively.

returns.name: totalNumberOfLines
returns.description: The total number of lines in the disassembly text.

returns.name: functionBodyOffsets
returns.description:
The offsets of all function bodies, in the format [start1, end1,
start2, end2, ...] where all ends are exclusive.

returns.name: chunk
returns.description: The first chunk of disassembly.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables debugger for the given page. Clients should not assume that the debugging has been
enabled until the result for this command is received.

parameters.name: maxScriptsCacheSize
parameters.description:
The maximum size in bytes of collected scripts (not referenced by other heap objects)
the debugger can hold. Puts no limit if parameter is omitted.

returns.name: debuggerId
returns.description: Unique identifier of the debugger.
